title: stelis latimarginata
intro: Stelis latimarginata, also known as the narrow-margined stelis, is a species of orchid native to Central and South America. As a medicinal plant, Stelis latimarginata has been used to treat various health issues due to its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant has been found to have potential health benefits, including reducing oxidative stress, improving cardiovascular health, and exhibiting antimicrobial activity. In herbal preparations, Stelis latimarginata can be consumed as a tea, used in tinctures, or applied topically to the skin, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
